{{ define "main" }} {{/* If the home page has its own _index.md, render a landing layout using its content */}} {{ with .File }}
{{- $content := $.Content -}} {{- $content = $content | replaceRE `]*)\ssrc="\.\./static/([^"]+)"([^>]*)>` `` -}}
{{ $content | safeHTML }}
{{ else }} {{/* No _index.md at content root → show a simple list of top-level sections and pages */}}
{{- with .Content -}} {{- $content := . -}} {{- $content = $content | replaceRE `]*)\ssrc="\.\./static/([^"]+)"([^>]*)>` `` -}}
{{ $content | safeHTML }}
{{- end -}}
    {{ $items := slice }} {{ range .Site.Sections }} {{ $items = $items | append . }} {{ end }} {{ range .RegularPages }} {{ $items = $items | append . }} {{ end }} {{ range $items.ByWeight }}
  • {{ .LinkTitle }}
    • {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ end }}
